title: Update People in change_multiple_column_values
excerpt:
Hello guys, 
when creating an item via API (create_item), it is possible to add the email address of the person as string. If I want to update an item via API (change_multiple_column_values), the API is requesting the id…

posts.author: WW-Ramin (Ramin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello guys,

when creating an item via API (create_item), it is possible to add the email address of the person as string. If I want to update an item via API (change_multiple_column_values), the API is requesting the id of the person and does not accept the email address.

Why?

Best regards
Ramin
